'''Ona Kragg''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Kadas'sa'Nikto/Legends|Kadas'sa'Nikto]] who worked for [[Longo Two-Guns]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was wanted by [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] for killing four of his own personal staff. The [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] worth 6,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] [[Death/Legends|dead]] or alive was claimed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].
